notes: Repaired Spending Plan saves so rows are appended using the live Pathmark Sync sheet header order, protecting older beta sheets from shifted values when optional notes are blank.
Disabled Streamlit magic output to prevent raw DeltaGenerator/code-like blocks appearing after actions.
Kept low-level diagnostics out of user-facing safe-section errors.
Improved Spending Plan beta to reflect the original workbook's three spending buckets and account transfer logic.
Expanded starter spending categories for everyday spend, sinking funds, fixed costs, health, vehicle, loans, subscriptions, miscellaneous and investment-property expenses.
Changed Spending Plan forms so validation warnings do not clear entered amounts.
release: v0.6.11 Spending Plan repair and guidance
release_notes: Repairs Spending Plan saves for older sync sheet headers, prevents raw Streamlit object output, and adds clearer spending-bucket and account-transfer guidance based on the original workbook system.
